description: Product Description SOCKSHOP Wild Feet Go WILD with our selection of novelty animal themed socks from Wild Feet . Choose from a range of styles - from socks and slippers to gift sets - featuring cool nature themed and novelty designs! Triple Packs for Triple FUN! Our triple packs mix slogans with practical plains and eye-catching designs, in six sets to set you apart from everyone else’s boring sock selections. All are made in a soft, cotton rich blend of breathable fibres to keep your feet feeling as cool as they’ll look. Socks Fit for a KING Ideal for ‘lion’ around the house or prowling your territory like a king, our triple set of colourful SOCKSHOP Wild Feet Chilling Lion Socks show the coolest cat around, complete with sunglasses, on bright blue and orange (with confetti polka dot) backgrounds. You’ll roar with approval at the soft, smooth feel of these fine gauge socks. SAY HELLO TO SUMMER It’s totally acceptable to go a little crazy from the heat, so why don’t you get ready for this summer and stock up on our wacky SOCKSHOP Wild Feet Slogan Cotton Sports Socks? Check out our colourful bamboo range! Socks rich in bamboo are kind to all skin types, with the smooth, non-irritating fibres preventing itching and absorbing more than three times the moisture that cotton can, keeping skin healthily dry by wicking the moisture swiftly. Bamboo is naturally antibacterial too, helping keep the microbes that cause foot odour at bay. Soft in silky bamboo , our SOCKSHOP Wild Feet Bamboo Socks are comfortable, light everyday socks in a triple pack of bright, colourful mixed designs. Cute Shoe Liners! We think that you’ll go wild for our latest cute, cotton rich shoe liners – our ladies Wild Feet Animal and Food Design Invisible Socks are available in a whole variety of looks. These fine gauge socks have convenient, secure anti-slip heel grips to stop them slipping down underfoot, but we think you’ll mostly pick them for their great, colourful woven animal faces.
